title: Simplify risk and compliance assessments with the new common control library in AWS Audit Manager
description: Map enterprise controls to AWS data sources effortlessly with predefined, pre-mapped controls based on auditor reviews. Automatically inherit improvements as Audit Manager updates.
creator: Danilo Poccia
